payload.description: Layer-2 CI merge gate (HG-DF C): attestation-based lifecycle verifier

payload.reason: Independent subagent plan review: APPROVE-WITH-FIXES, no blocking defects. Verified reused-module contracts (derive_state keys by change_id; event_counts populates milestone types; verification_passed hard-prereq satisfied in test streams; find_ordering_violations contract), CLI conventions vs pr.py/plan.py, template injection-guard compat, cli-reference drift handling. Folded: no-sync guard (prevent un-scoped AGENTS.md/.gitignore re-render failing self-gate) + design §4.3 verbatim-scope correction.

Independent superpowers:code-reviewer: APPROVE-WITH-FIXES. Ran 35 tests green; verified fail-closed on git failure, binding short-circuit, implementation_withdrawn/verification_passed milestone coverage, env-indirection in CI. Fixed BLOCKING B1 (fail-OPEN: non-.jsonl file under attestations/ escaped the gate) by narrowing _is_attestation_path to .jsonl + 3 regression tests (G1 non-jsonl subject, G2 rename-into-dir, G3 one-bad-attestation-fails-run). Folded N2 docstring honesty. 1258 green, ruff+mypy clean.
